title: Caribou Slips Aboard
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Rayleigh, Narrator, Fish-Men, Brook, Nami, Franky. The core story beat is caribou slips aboard.
scene: The scene centers on caribou slips aboard, with Unknown person #1, Rayleigh, Narrator, Fish-Men, Brook, Nami, Franky driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get Back Here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nghh...!! It's tough reaching into the sea...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Keep it up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Jeez...!! what's wrong with you, SanJ!?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Since when are you so... sensitive to women?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This isn't like you!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: How terrible... What on earth could have happened to the lady-loving Sanji-san over the past two years.....?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this rate, if he really does meet any of the mermaids he has been pining for...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: He'll be needing a blood donation when we get to fishman Island... I wonder if mermaids and fishmen have the same blood types as humans...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: shiver...shiver..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At any rate, as we just saw, it would seem that this bubble...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is no different from the bubbles of Sabaody, yes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What're you calmly carrying on with that conversation for?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right! They're essentially the same! They'll stretch to a certain extent, but go any further and you just burst right through!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently, even if we were to fire pistols or cannons through it at wild beasts attacking the ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The bubble still wouldn't pop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, what would pop it, then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaahh! Look out! Behind us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Apparently it wouldn't be able to withstand having lots of holes opened in it at once.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For instance, we don't want to get bitten by a sea king's fangs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if the ship itself were to crash into a rock or a cliff and get badly damaged...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaaghH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the cracks in the mast or in the ship's body would cause the bubble to break as well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In other words, what we need to watch out for is undersea creatures and environmental obstacles.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as we don't do anything too stupid, we shouldn't end lip breaking it from the inside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A fight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see! It's actually pretty tough, then, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: However...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: "Be careful, because 70% of ships sailing for fishman Island are sunk before they ever get there."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the heck happens to them?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, I bet I could grab all those fish if I used my gatling!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's have a contest, then- see who can get the most!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did Nami just say about not making lots of holes?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll seriously kill you both!!! Don't ever do that again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Jeez...!! I thought that Hachi guy was going to guide us to fishman Island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...so I thought it would be safer than this...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah! I brought tons of food! Since Sanji's like that at the moment, why don't we all tuck in-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaah!!! I'm starving!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho hoho! My bones are starving, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nami... is the ship settled down at this point?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Uh-huh. We're just cruising along a large current at the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: thing is, there's something I have to tell everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All your robotic secrets?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NO... I'M AFRAID... #bzt* I am afraid that is incorrect.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Awesome--!! He's talking robot- speak!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Originally, Hachi had volunteered to guide us on our voyage to fishman Island...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: ...but he was badly wounded on Sabaody, and has been forced to retire to fishman Island already...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was wounded for the same reason as duval....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: That is to say, in the process of defending the thousand sunny from attackers! Around a year ago now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?! But then... how come the ship has been safe from then up until now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: because it had one more defender.....

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: The very man who tore our crew apart two years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Member of the Royal Shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Bartholomew Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: A few days ago... when I first arrived at the sunny...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I couldn't believe my eyes...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have been waiting for you...

summary: Caribou Slips Aboard. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
